affiliations.title: Director of Applied AI Research, Salesforce 7:15 pm - Lightning / Community Talks Securing the AI Agent Workforce by Amean Asad of Lunal Control Agent Behavior

Director of Applied AI Research, Salesforce This talk will introduce two recent research works from Salesforce AI Research - GTA1 and CoAct-1, share learnings and experiences from these advances. Then, the talk will share on-going research work on building enterprise specific computer-use agent benchmark, and discuss challenges and opportunities of CUA

name: Ran Xu
